red.scratchpad: Open with more infantry and mortar, drop mbt and excess drones. Infantry proved decisive; keep them frontline. Mortars effective at range, stay behind cover. Medics useful for sustaining infantry. Drones useful for early scouting but die quickly; limit to 3. Consider adding a second tank (mbt) if opponent fields many mbt, but currently not needed. Use x=22 cover for infantry to reduce losses. Keep units near center to control middle lane.

blue.scratchpad: Observation: enemy massed infantry overwhelmed our thin front; tanks survived longer but lacked early engagement. Mortars performed well at range but died quickly; consider placing them behind obstacles. Medics died early, reduce their exposure. Drones gave good vision but rarely attacked; use them to harass and gather intel. Plan: increase tank count to 6, add an extra mortar for sustained fire, keep 10 infantry for DPS, add 3 medics to support frontline, keep 4 drones for vision and harassment. Adjust positioning to stay behind x=22 and x=41 cover when possible.
